The type of power sockets used in Denmark are Type A and Type K. Make sure your devices are compatible or have an adapter.
The official currency in Denmark is the Danish Krone (DKK). Most places do not accept euros.
The weather in Copenhagen in December is below -15 degrees Celsius. Dress warmly if you're visiting during this time.
You can get a Copenhagen Card that covers 80 attractions and public transports with $30. It's a cost-effective way to explore the city
The tip rate in Copenhagen is over 50%. Be prepared for this when dining out or using services.
Remember to try out traditional Danish food. The Danish pastry, Smørrebrød (open-faced sandwich), and Frikadeller (meatballs) are must-tries. The food scene in Copenhagen is diverse and delicious!
